nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I think I'm more likely to collaborate

nodes.label: AI for tedious and structured tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for creative and personal tasks
nodes.grounding_span: doing something tedious like updating a contract

nodes.label: AI reliability and trustworthiness
nodes.grounding_span: I don't always feel like I can trust AI for more complex math yet, as I've seen it make errors

nodes.label: Authentic human touch in output
nodes.grounding_span: there is a bit of an AI voice that is recognizable

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool for dreaded tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it saved me a lot of time. It also got me started on a project I was sort of dreading

nodes.label: Workplace norms and peer influence on AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I feel shamed by some of more savvy colleagues

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it saved me a lot of time

nodes.label: Authenticity and human connection
nodes.grounding_span: having an authentic human touch is still of value

nodes.label: Professional competence and value addition
nodes.grounding_span: I don't feel like I'm adding value by doing that

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for overcoming task initiation
nodes.grounding_span: I was pretty satisfied was needing to update a contract

nodes.label: Frustration with unedited AI output from others
nodes.grounding_span: I get frustrated sometimes when people send me unedited things from ChatGPT

nodes.label: Preference for handling creative tasks personally
nodes.grounding_span: I generally prefer to handle more creative things or things I'm interested in myself

nodes.label: Optimistic expectation of increased AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: looking ahead, we will be using AI much more day to day

nodes.label: Concern about aggressive AI rollout
nodes.grounding_span: companies have gone too hard too quickly on AI and it's a bit aggressive

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative prompting — refines prompts based on AI responses
nodes.grounding_span: when I read a response I'll realize I left out a key piece of information

nodes.label: Domain-based task allocation — distinguishes creative vs. tedious tasks
